title: naughty things are wrong question
wikitext:
[]: naughty things are wrong--- question             Quote Post by NERV » Mon Jun 20, 2005 5:19 pm Is it true that the Japanese version of evangelion had Shinji and Asuka in a relationship? And didnt Asuka get pregnant or something -- just wanted to know I dont want to buy the Japanese version and not be able to read it, you know. Hmmm maybe i should learn...

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Jun 20, 2005 5:37 pm Oh, shit. It's begun!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jun 20, 2005 5:46 pm Assuming you've seen the Director's Cut footage for episodes 21-24 (Resurrection; and Genesis Reborn DVDs), or Platinum or even Death; plus EoE, of course, then that's it for the real deal. All that's left is loss in translation. There are a shedload of unofficial spin-offs (plus a few official ones, building off the alternate universe of ep#26, with Misato as school-ma'am); and of course the Sadamoto manga, still not yet complete. Sticking strictly with the anime, the interactions between the two are complicated; but any supposition of Asuka being pregnant are a wild misreading of her closing like "Kimochi warui." - which can mean "I feel sick.", but are intended to express her disgust at Shinji's actions at the beginning of EoE. We can discount it as in ep#9 Shinji is oblivious to the challenge he has been set; in ep#15 he fails to respond to direct action, in ep#22, Asuka is menstruating, and she runs away following that. No obvious opportunity there, then.

[]:             Quote Post by NERV » Mon Jun 20, 2005 5:55 pm awww...so no Asuka/Shinji baby....hmmm that gives me and idea haha....maybe they should. Like at the end of the series, everything was normal and Misato was the school teacher...shouldnt GAINAX or Anno make a sequal to that.?! Yeah, of course it would be out of line to change everything but keep the same characters, but that would be something i wouldnt mind watching every day... haha ...

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Jun 20, 2005 6:17 pm shouldnt GAINAX or Anno make a sequal to that.?! Yeah, of course it would be out of line to change everything but keep the same characters, but that would be something i wouldnt mind watching every day... haha ...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 20, 2005 6:32 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Sticking strictly with the anime, the interactions between the two are complicated; but any supposition of Asuka being pregnant are a wild misreading of her closing like "Kimochi warui." - which can mean "I feel sick.", but are intended to express her disgust at Shinji's actions at the beginning of EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Jun 20, 2005 6:37 pm The idea of Shinji having sexual relations with anyone over the course of the show becomes more and more implausable the more you find out about his underlying character. He consistently passes up every oppertunity for physical love that comes his way. It makes sense when you think that he really should learn to walk before he can run.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Jun 20, 2005 6:46 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Well, Anno saying that it's a reference to possible morning sickness certainly doesn't help any.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jun 20, 2005 7:10 pm Phaze wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Well, Anno saying that it's a reference to possible morning sickness certainly doesn't help any.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 21, 2005 1:32 am NERV wrote: awww...so no Asuka/Shinji baby....hmmm that gives me and idea haha....maybe they should.

[]:             Quote Post by NERV » Tue Jun 21, 2005 1:39 am Isnt that sweet................Someone beat me to it. haha More time for other things....dont ask.

[]:             Quote Post by NERV » Tue Jun 21, 2005 1:43 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: He consistently passes up every oppertunity for physical love that comes his way. It makes sense when you think that he really should learn to walk before he can run.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Jun 21, 2005 2:37 am well, we dont see it, but i think it is the consensus that he doesnt he does, however, kiss Asuka when she challenges him to it, but he is ratehr timid, and would need the other person to initiate contact (that is unless he went on one of his angry/i-have-a-backbone moments

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jun 21, 2005 3:52 am NERV wrote: He did kiss Asuka in her sleep...,i guess thats like almost walking,, or standing a bit.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Jun 21, 2005 7:12 am NERV wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: He consistently passes up every oppertunity for physical love that comes his way. It makes sense when you think that he really should learn to walk before he can run.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jun 21, 2005 7:21 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: NERV wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: He consistently passes up every oppertunity for physical love that comes his way. It makes sense when you think that he really should learn to walk before he can run.

[]:             Quote Post by KIC » Tue Jun 21, 2005 7:54 am Soluzar wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: NERV wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: He consistently passes up every oppertunity for physical love that comes his way. It makes sense when you think that he really should learn to walk before he can run.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Tue Jun 21, 2005 8:49 am KIC wrote: Soluzar wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: NERV wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: He consistently passes up every oppertunity for physical love that comes his way. It makes sense when you think that he really should learn to walk before he can run.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 21, 2005 10:16 am If fearing sex at the age of 14 represents "dysfunction", then I have another one to add to my list of personal afflictions.

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Tue Jun 21, 2005 10:20 am Reichu wrote: If fearing sex at the age of 14 represents "dysfunction", then I have another one to add to my list of personal afflictions.
